title: Oral care system including oral care implement with motion tracking features
abstract: An oral care system includes an oral care implement and motion tracking attachment configured to allow tracking of the implement during an oral care activity such as tooth brushing. The oral care implement may include a handle and head. The tracking attachment is coupled to the implement and comprises colored tracking markers detectable by a programmable visual-based motion tracking unit. The tracking attachment in one configuration may comprise a housing with plural insertable tracking colored wedges. In another configuration, a colored tracking portion colored panels and optional colored neck band may be formed on or attached to the oral care implement. Both the tracking attachment and tracking portion embodiments as applicable facilitate tracking at least one of a position, orientation, movement, and the like of the oral care implement to which it is attached. The tracking attachment may be non-electric in nature without any onboard electronics in some embodiments.
claims: Claims CLAIMS WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. An oral care implement with motion tracking features, the oral care implement comprising: an elongated body defining a longitudinal axis and comprising a handle defining a proximal end, a head defining a distal end, and a neck connecting the handle to the head; and a tracking attachment coupled to the handle and comprising a plurality of colored tracking markers, the tracking markers configured to facilitate tracking motion of the oral care implement by a user; wherein the tracking attachment protrudes transversely outwards relative to the longitudinal axis no farther than the handle. 2. The oral care implement according to claim 1, wherein the colored tracking markers includes at least two different colors. 3. The oral care implement according to claims 1 or 2, wherein the tracking attachment is insertably received in an outwardly open receptacle formed in the proximal end of the handle. 4. The oral care implement according to claim 3, wherein the tracking attachment includes an outwardly open receiving cavity, and the tracking markers are formed by a set of colored inserts received and mounted in the cavity, the colored inserts including at least two different colors. 5. The oral care implement according to claims 4, wherein the receiving cavity has a circular shape in transverse cross section. 6. The oral care implement according to claims 4 or 5, wherein each of the colored inserts has a wedge shape to form a sector of a circle. 7. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 4 to 6, wherein the receiving cavity includes a plurality of axially-extending coupling protrusions, each of the axial coupling protrusions being coupled to one of the colored inserts which retains the respective insert in the axial cavity. 8. The oral care implement according to claim 7, wherein each colored insert has an inwardly open engagement recess configured to frictionally engage one of the axial coupling protrusions. 9. The oral care implement according to claim 8, wherein the axial coupling protrusions have a cylindrical shape. 10. The oral care implement according to claims 8 or 9, wherein the engagement recesses of the colored inserts have a wedge shape. 23 11. The oral care implement according to claim 8, wherein the axial coupling protrusions have a wedge shape and the engagement recess of the multi-colored inserts have a corresponding wedge shape. 12. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 4 to 11, wherein the colored inserts do not project outwards axially beyond the proximal end of the handle of the oral care implement in a longitudinal direction. 13. The oral care implement according to claim 12, wherein the colored inserts are recessed into the proximal end of the handle. 14. The oral care implement according to claim 3, wherein the tracking attachment and the receptacle in the handle each have a substantially cylindrical configuration. 15. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 4 to 14, wherein the tracking attachment includes a distally open extension cavity which is in communication with an interior space of the handle of the oral care implement. 16. The oral care implement according to claim 15, wherein the tracking attachment includes a transversely oriented partition wall which separates the receiving cavity from the extension cavity. 17. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 1 to 16, wherein the tracking attachment is not spherical in shape. 18. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 1 to 17, wherein the motion includes at least one of a position, orientation, or movement of the head of the oral care implement within an oral cavity of a user. 19. A method for assembling an oral care implement with tracking features, the oral care implement comprising: providing an outwardly open receptacle in the oral care implement; and inserting a tracking attachment into the receptacle; the tracking attachment including a plurality of colored tracking markers visible after the tracking attachment is inserted into the receptacle. 20. The method according to claim 19, wherein the inserting step includes aligning and engaging a first anti-rotation feature on the tracking attachment with a second anti-rotation feature on the oral care implement within the receptacle. 21. The method according to claims 19 or 20, wherein the colored tracking markers comprise a plurality of colored inserts disposed in the tracking attachment, the inserts each having a wedge shape and including at least two different colors. 22. The method according to any one of claims 19 to 21, wherein the method further comprises selecting a set of the colored inserts from a plurality of the colored inserts, and mounting the selected set of colored inserts in an outwardly open receiving cavity of the tracking attachment. 23. The method according to claim 22, wherein the mounting step includes frictionally engaging a coupling protrusion in the receiving cavity with each of the colored wedges. 24. An oral care implement with motion tracking features, the oral care implement comprising: an elongated body defining a longitudinal axis and comprising a handle defining a proximal end, a head defining a distal end, and a neck connecting the handle to the head; and a tracking portion disposed on the handle, the tracking portion including a plurality of colored tracking markers, the tracking markers configured to facilitate tracking motion of the oral care implement by a user; wherein the tracking portion protrudes transversely outwards relative to the longitudinal axis no farther than the handle. 25. The oral care implement according to claim 24, wherein the colored tracking markers include at least two different colors. 26. The oral care implement according to claims 24 or 25, wherein the tracking portion is disposed on the proximal end of the handle. 27. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 24 to 26, wherein the colored tracking markers are formed by a plurality of colored panels disposed on the tracking portion. 28. The oral care implement according to claim 27, wherein each of the colored panels includes a bottom portion disposed on a bottom surface of tracking portion, and a corresponding side portion disposed on the lateral sides of the tracking portion. 29. The oral care implement according to claim 28, wherein the bottom and side portions of the colored panels are contiguous such that a color of each colored panel begins on the bottom surface of the tracking portion and is continuous through a transition between the bottom and side portions without interruption in color. 30. The oral care implement according to claims 28 or 29, wherein the bottom portion of the colored panels are each wedge shaped on the bottom surface of the tracking portion. 31. The oral care implement according to any one of claim 28 to 30, wherein the side portions of the colored panels are each square or rectangular shaped. 32. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 24 to 30, wherein the bottom surface of the tracking portion is flat. 33. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 24 to 32, wherein the tracking portion has lateral sides which are substantially flush with an outer surface of the proximal end of the handle adjoining the tracking portion. 34. The oral care implement according to claim 24, further comprising a multi-colored neck band disposed between the proximal and distal ends of the body of the oral care implement. 35. The oral care implement according to claim 34, wherein the neck band extends circumferentially around the body. 36. The oral care implement according to claim 35, wherein the neck band comprises a plurality of different color arc segments comprising at least two different colors. 37. The oral care implement according to claim 36, wherein the arc segment are arranged such that no arc segment having a certain color is axially aligned with a colored panel on the tracking portion having that same certain color. 38. The oral care implement according to any one of claim 34 to 37, wherein the neck band is disposed between the handle and neck. 39. The oral care implement according to claim 24, wherein the tracking portion is detachably coupled to the proximal end of the handle. 40. The oral care implement according to claim 24, wherein the tracking portion is integrally formed as a unitary structural part of handle. 41. The oral care implement according to any one of claim 24 to 40, wherein the oral care implement is an electric toothbrush with at least one of an oscillating head and vibrating head. 42. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 24 to 41, wherein the head and neck are integrally formed as a unitary structural part of a replacement head detachably coupled to the handle. 43. The oral care implement according to any one of claims 24 to 42, wherein the tracking portion of the tracking attachment is not spherical in shape. 26
